final_code:
import duckdb, os

DB_PATH = r"/Users/as-mac-1375/Documents/GenAI Lab Materials/sigma-genai-de/day10/lab/sigma_platform.duckdb"

def run_custom_analysis():
    conn = duckdb.connect(DB_PATH)
    
    df = conn.execute("SELECT * FROM silver_transactions WHERE amount > 0").fetchdf()
    
    unique_merchants = df["merchant_id"].nunique()
    
    summary = df.groupby("merchant_id").agg({"amount": "sum"}).reset_index()
    
    summary_sorted = summary.sort_values("amount", ascending=False)
    
    conn.close()
    
    print(f"Analysis complete. Unique merchants: {unique_merchants}")

if __name__ == "__main__":
    run_custom_analysis()
